hero.role: Software Engineer, Frontend Developer, and Community Leader
hero.description: I build modern web experiences that are easy to use and open to more people. My work connects tech, inclusion, women leaders, and native communities in Colombia.

about.title: More than code
about.description: My story connects software, frontend work, community, and Wayuu identity.
about.imageAlt: Rina Plata at a tech community event
paragraphs: I am Rina Plata, a software engineer with experience in frontend work, web access, and community leadership. I see tech as a tool to open doors, tell stories, and build products that feel more human.

I enjoy building clear and useful interfaces. I work with Angular, React, TypeScript, access needs, and UX good practices so more people can use digital products. I also use AI in my projects to save time and improve the user experience, with care and respect for users.
I also lead and join communities. I speak about education, web access, women in tech, native identity, and social impact.

plain.title: Plain Language Summary
plain.description: Here is the short version of this site.
items: I build websites and apps that are easier for people to use.
I work with teams, communities, and women in tech.
I share talks about code, access, identity, and learning.
You can see my work, talks, projects, and ways to contact me below.

experience.title: My Professional Journey
experience.description: Hands-on work with interfaces, APIs, access needs, and communities.

responsibilities: Build fast, clear, and easy-to-use experiences.
Work remotely with product and technology teams.
achievements: Helped build products for the energy field.

responsibilities: Work with .NET and Blazor on healthcare and insurance solutions.
Build screens and flows that more people can use.
achievements: Worked on key products with a focus on safety and scale.
Used frontend and backend skills in real projects.

responsibilities: Built clear and useful solutions for different projects.
Built layouts, components, and service integrations.
achievements: Contributed to real web products for more than two years.
Grew my skills in Angular, access needs, and remote work.

responsibilities: Tracked tasks and documentation in Asana.
Participated in interface updates and maintenance.
achievements: Built early experience working with remote teams.
Used AngularJS in a real project context.

responsibilities: Managed social media and helped course authors.
Checked online courses and joined live streams.
achievements: Built early experience connecting education, tech, and people work.

talks.title: Speaking on Tech, Community, and Inclusion
talks.description: Talks, panels, interviews, and podcasts about code, access, identity, and leadership.
talks.allTalksDescription: A full list of talks, panels, podcasts, articles, and community events.

jsconf-wayuu.title: My Experience as a Wayuu Programmer in Technology
jsconf-wayuu.description: A talk about work experience, Wayuu identity, and native communities in tech.

wtm-emancipation.title: Technology as a Tool for Women's Emancipation
wtm-emancipation.description: A short talk on how tech can support freedom, identity, and women in society. Presented with Miguel Teheran at Universidad EAFIT.

caribeconf-accessibility.title: Accessibility: Inclusion from Your Code
caribeconf-accessibility.description: A talk about tech that includes more cultures and more people. It covers Wayuunaiki, WCAG, and tools like Playwright.

ciandt-ai-inclusion.title: Technology for Everyone: AI and Inclusion
ciandt-ai-inclusion.description: A talk about AI, new ideas, and inclusion. It shows how to build tech that is useful for different communities.

pioneras-learning.title: Developer Learning Tools
pioneras-learning.description: My first talk as a speaker, at the launch of Pioneras Cartagena. The event also had a panel about women from Cartagena in tech.

we-can-code-it.title: We Can Code It!
we-can-code-it.description: A talk about talent, history, and women in tech with Daniela Gomez, Sandy Atencio, and Vrilly Castro.

datasoul-wayuu.title: Wayuu Programmer in the Tech Industry
datasoul-wayuu.description: An episode about work experience, Wayuu identity, and native women in the tech industry.

devlokos-career.title: The Challenge of Starting in Software Development
devlokos-career.description: S2 Ep042 about the challenges and lessons of starting a software career.

telerik-inspiring.title: Inspiring Women: Rina Plata
telerik-inspiring.description: An interview about Wayuu identity, tech work, communities, leadership, and STEM lessons.

pioneras-api-colombia.title: Discovering the Power of Open Data: Exploring API Colombia with React.js
pioneras-api-colombia.description: A talk about using open data and public Colombian APIs to build frontend projects with React.js.

kcd-diversity.title: Diversity and Inclusion in STEAM
kcd-diversity.description: A panel about diversity and inclusion in STEAM.

tech-talk-code.title: Tech Talk: Women in Code
tech-talk-code.description: A live panel about women in tech and work stories.
tech-talk-code.alt: Tech Talk: Women in Code panel with speakers from the technology community

putumayo-ancestral.title: Using Tech to Keep Ancestral Knowledge Alive
putumayo-ancestral.description: A talk about keeping ancestral knowledge alive with tech. It was part of the Inspiration and Technology event at Instituto Tecnologico de Putumayo.

boyaconf-accessible-js.title: Programming to Include with JavaScript: Accessible Technology
boyaconf-accessible-js.description: A talk about building web experiences with JavaScript that more people can use. It focuses on WCAG and good coding practices.

hackseiiis.title: HACKSEIIIS - TDEA's First Hackathon
hackseiiis.description: I helped lead the first hackathon run by students and teachers at Tecnologico de Antioquia. The event brought several universities together. It showed the value of community work, women leaders, and new tech ideas.
hackseiiis.alt: HACKSEIIIS team at Tecnologico de Antioquia

communities.title: Community Leadership and Learning Networks
communities.description: Spaces where I help through mentoring, events, talks, and service.

guardianes.description: A project that shares native knowledge through stories, learning, and tech.
guardianes.impact: Created learning and support spaces for Wayuu children and communities in La Guajira.

api-colombia.description: An open source project with a free public REST API for data about Colombia.
api-colombia.impact: Helped people access data about regions, tourism, culture, native communities, airports, and more. This supports learning projects and digital products.

tech-community.description: A Colombian community for people, learning, and tech jobs.
tech-community.impact: Organized spaces to share knowledge, build networks, and show tech talent.

pioneras-dev.description: A community that supports women in tech.
pioneras-dev.impact: Talks, mentoring, and support for women as they grow their careers.

women-techmakers.description: A global program that gives women in tech more support, community, and resources.
women-techmakers.impact: Joined talks about women leaders, inclusion, and tech community through 2025.

wids.description: A community focused on data, learning, and women in science and tech.
wids.impact: Represented WiDS in Medellin through 2024. I helped connect education, tech, and opportunities for women.

projects.title: Digital Products with a Human Approach
projects.description: Frontend work, access, education, and social impact.

portfolio.name: Professional Portfolio
portfolio.description: Personal website built to show experience, talks, communities, and projects.
portfolio.impact: Shows work connected to tech, access, and different cultures.

communities.name: Technology for Communities
communities.description: Digital content for learning, community, and social impact.
communities.impact: Brings tech tools into talks about land, education, and identity.

achievements.title: Recognition and Milestones
achievements.description: Milestones that show learning, service, and community work.

featured.title: Outstanding Woman in Technology
featured.description: Award from Tecnologico de Antioquia for work in tech and community leadership.
featured.alt: Rina Plata holding a tech award

jsconf.title: Speaker at JSConf
jsconf.description: Talk about her experience as a Wayuu developer in tech.

community.title: Indigenous Community Leadership
community.description: Growth of Guardianes Ancestrales as a bridge between identity, learning, and tech.

education.title: Software Engineering Education
education.description: Software Engineering student at Tecnologico de Antioquia.

languages.title: Languages and Identity
languages.description: Native Spanish and Wayuunaiki speaker, with A2 English level.

contact.title: Let's Talk About Tech, Community, or Collaboration
contact.description: Reach out through my main channels to work together, build community, or share ideas.

footer.builtWith: Built with Angular, accessibility, and community.
